productDisplayName: CASIO Edifice Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch EX044
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel back, has a bezel with a tachymeterDial style: Black dialFeatures: A screw to reset the time, three-faced chronograph display, a tachymeter, alarm, timer, date and day apertures, two push-buttons to adjust the featuresStrap style: Silver-toned stainless steel bracelet-style strap with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 100 mWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
